svg.title: Smart Pipeline AWS Architecture
svg.desc: Flowchart showing file upload through API Gateway, Lambda, S3, then routing to Rekognition, Textract, or Bedrock, with results stored in DynamoDB and notifications via SNS.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the frontend dashboard')
sendPrompt('How does API Gateway work in this project?')
sendPrompt('What does the Upload Lambda do?')
sendPrompt('How does the results retrieval work?')
sendPrompt('How is S3 used in Smart Pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does the Processing Lambda route files?')
sendPrompt('What does Amazon Rekognition do in this project?')
sendPrompt('What does Amazon Textract do in this project?')
sendPrompt('What does Amazon Bedrock do in this project?')
sendPrompt('How is DynamoDB used in Smart Pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How is SNS used in Smart Pipeline?')
